title: Gateway to Eternity - Random Gate Spawning
description: Random spawning gateways from Gateway to Eternity mod
body:
This mod adds random spawning mechanics for gates from the [Gateways to Eternity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gateways-to-eternity) mod. It is designed to add suspense and excitement by making powerful gateways appear unexpectedly during gameplay.

How It Works

Every Minecraft **day at sunrise** (`time == 1`), the mod evaluates whether to spawn a gateway using the following logic:

Spawn Logic

* Selects a **random player in the Overworld**. * Chooses a **surface block 50–300 blocks away** from that player as the potential spawn location. * Spawns the gate at a **random time during the day**, not necessarily right at sunrise.

Spawn Chance Progression

* If spawning fails, the chance increases each day: * **20% → 40% → 60% → 80%** * After a successful spawn: * The chance resets to **20%** * **No gate will spawn the next day** (to prevent over-spawning)

Visual Feedback & Integration

* Shows a **notification** when a gate is about to appear. * If **JourneyMap** is installed: * A **waypoint** is automatically created at the gate location. * A **beam of light** highlights the gate using **FTB Map**. * The gate’s chunk is **force-loaded** via **FTB Chunks** to ensure reliable generation.

Dependency

  • Gateways to Eternity (Required)
  • FTB Chunks (Required)
  • JourneyMap (Optional)
